acceptance.heading: 1. Acceptance of Terms
acceptance.content: By accessing and using the Katsina Online Business (KOB) website and services, you accept and agree to be bound by the terms and provision of this agreement. If you do not agree to abide by the above, please do not use this service.

responsibilities.heading: 2. User Responsibilities
items: You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account information
You agree to accept responsibility for all activities that occur under your account
You must provide accurate and complete information when registering
You agree not to use our service for any illegal or unauthorized purpose

product_listings.heading: 3. Product Listings & Sales
items: Accurately describing products and their conditions
Ensuring all products comply with local laws and regulations
Providing timely and accurate delivery information
Maintaining professional conduct with buyers

prohibited.heading: 4. Prohibited Activities
items: Post illegal, defamatory, abusive, or obscene content
Engage in harassment, threats, or intimidation
Use automated systems to access or use KOB services
Attempt to gain unauthorized access to any system
Post spam, false information, or misleading content

liability.heading: 5. Limitation of Liability
liability.content: Katsina Online Business (KOB) is provided on an 'AS IS' and 'AS AVAILABLE' basis. We make no warranties, either express or implied. We shall not be liable for any indirect, special, consequential, or punitive damages.

dispute_resolution.heading: 6. Dispute Resolution
dispute_resolution.content: Any disputes arising from the use of KOB services shall be resolved through direct negotiation or mediation. If not resolved, disputes may be escalated to appropriate legal authorities in Katsina State, Nigeria.

changes.heading: 7. Changes to Terms
changes.content: We reserve the right to modify these terms at any time. Changes will be effective immediately upon posting to the website. Your continued use of the service following any changes constitutes your acceptance of the new terms.

contact.heading: 8. Contact Us
contact.content: For questions about these Terms and Conditions, please contact us at:

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: Katsina Online Business (KOB) is committed to protecting your privacy. This policy outlines how we collect, use, and protect your personal information.

collection.heading: 1. Information We Collect
collection.intro: We collect information you provide directly, including:
items: Account registration information (name, email, phone, address)
Payment and billing information
Product listings and descriptions
Communication and support records
Device and usage information

usage.heading: 2. How We Use Your Information
items: Provide and improve our services
Process transactions and send confirmations
Send important updates and customer service messages
Prevent fraud and ensure security
Personalize your experience

protection.heading: 3. Data Protection
protection.content: We implement industry-standard security measures to protect your personal information. However, no method of transmission over the internet is 100% secure. We cannot guarantee absolute security.

sharing.heading: 4. Information Sharing
sharing.content: We do not sell, rent, or lease your personal information to third parties. We may share information with service providers who assist us in operating our website and conducting our business, subject to strict confidentiality agreements.

retention.heading: 5. Data Retention
retention.content: We retain your personal information for as long as your account is active or as long as necessary to provide you with our services. You can request deletion of your data at any time by contacting our support team.

rights.heading: 6. Your Rights
rights.content: You have the right to access, update, or delete your personal information. You can also opt-out of marketing communications at any time.

cookies.heading: 7. Cookies & Tracking
cookies.content: We use cookies and similar technologies to enhance your experience. You can control cookie settings through your browser preferences.

contact.heading: 8. Contact Us
contact.content: For privacy-related questions, please contact us at:

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Find answers to common questions about KOB

items.question: How do I create an account?
items.answer: Click the 'Register' button and fill in your details. You'll receive a verification email to confirm your account.

items.question: How can I list a product?
items.answer: Navigate to your Seller Dashboard and click 'Add Product'. Fill in the details, upload images, and set your price. Your product will be live immediately.

items.question: Is there a fee to list products?
items.answer: We offer free product listings for verified sellers. Check our Verified Sellers Program for special benefits.

items.question: How does payment work?
items.answer: We support secure payments through our payment gateway. All transactions are protected, and funds are released after order confirmation.

items.question: Can I edit my product listing?
items.answer: Yes! You can edit or delete your listings anytime from your Dashboard. Changes take effect immediately.

items.question: What if I have an issue with an order?
items.answer: Contact our support team through the Help Center or WhatsApp. We're available Monday-Friday, 9AM-6PM WAT.

items.question: How long does delivery take?
items.answer: Delivery times depend on your location and the seller's location. Most deliveries in Katsina metropolis take 2-3 business days.

items.question: What if I receive a defective product?
items.answer: Report the issue to the seller or our support team within 7 days of delivery. We'll help resolve the issue or arrange a refund.
